query: Wang Yi China Foreign Minister visit South Korea 2026 postponed Taiwan dispute rescheduled July August 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of what I found:

**Key finding:** As of the latest available reporting (April 2026, with context through July 2026), Wang Yi had **no confirmed visit** to South Korea. A hoped-for visit was reported "on hold" amid a **Taiwan labeling dispute**, but South Korea's foreign ministry **explicitly denied** the visit was "delayed" over Taiwan — saying arrangements were never finalized in the first place.

**The dispute:** South Korea removed the "China (Taiwan)" label from its e-arrival card system on March 31, 2026 (after Taipei's protests), which Beijing objected to on One China grounds. Tensions were compounded when China refused entry to South Korea's NIS director on April 21, 2026.

**On rescheduling (July/August 2026):** I found **no confirmed rescheduled date**. Reporting stated discussions had "not reached the stage of working out specific dates." Notably, Wang Yi's confirmed July 2026 travel was to Denmark, Sweden, Finland and Norway (July 2–8) — with no South Korea leg.

**Important caveat:** The "postponed" framing is contested — it came from Korean media (Korea Times) but was rejected by Seoul's government. Also note a separate, earlier event surfaced in searches (South Korean FM Cho Hyun visiting Beijing on Sept 17, 2025) that should not be conflated with the 2026 Wang-to-Seoul question.

One data limitation: AskNews was unavailable (credit/tier limits), so findings rely on web search and direct article fetches. I could not locate May–July 2026 news confirming either a definitive reschedule or cancellation.

sources.title: China puts Wang Yi's Seoul visit on hold over Taiwan labeling dispute
